outlook.volatilityExpectation: Positive total GEX stabilizes market, but heavy put skew suppresses upward mobility.
outlook.summary: Market exhibits stable volatility due to highly positive GEX, but extreme Put/Call ratios and bearish skew indicate strong institutional hedging. Expect downward magnetic pull toward Max Pain levels.

levels.motivazione: Massive Put OI across 0DTE (15.2k), WEEKLY (78.6k), and MONTHLY (53.6k) expirations. Institutional structural support.
Dominant Put OI cluster in all expirations (0DTE 24.4k, WEEKLY 11k, MONTHLY 37.6k) acting as a lower boundary.
Significant Call OI resistance in all three expirations (0DTE 10.8k, WEEKLY 15.7k, MONTHLY 22.3k).
0DTE Gamma Flip level and sentiment equilibrium. Spot is currently testing this critical pivot.
High Call OI in 0DTE (7.6k) and WEEKLY (25.8k) creates a near-term cap to upside movement.
0DTE Max Pain level, situated below current spot, acting as a strong magnetic target for market makers.
